features: Triple Clean Advanced Clean Dental floss works great for getting food from between your teeth It gets rid of anything lurking between your teeth and keeps your mouth fresh and clean.

They are easy and simple to use, disposable floss sticks dental. So easy to use and durable. You can use one stick for all your teeth with out the flossers for teeth breaking. Perfect for home and great to carry some in your purse for emergencies.

How to use tooth floss?3 easy steps to solve troubles. 1Align the dental floss stick to the teeth and move it left and right, Pull the floss picks up and down to clean the surface of teeth, Dental tooth floss picks will bring out food
How to use the tail?3 easy steps to solve troubles, 1 Clean the posterior, 2 Clean pit and fissure, 3 Clean the front teeth teeth

Smoothly work on tight teeth: It slides so easily between even the tightest teeth. Quality tooth picks floss sticks For Daily Dental Hygiene and leaves your mouth feeling nice and clean. dental floss stick, Beauty
